description: Triggers for writing detailed implementation or migration plans before touching code

queries.query: Write a detailed implementation plan before I start building the authentication system
I need a step-by-step migration plan for moving to AWS — don't execute yet, just plan
Create a written spec and plan for adding multi-tenancy to our SaaS app
Write a plan document for the database schema redesign I need to execute later
Help me plan this feature before we start building it — I'll execute it separately
Design a detailed plan for our microservices migration that someone else will execute
Write a technical plan with steps, dependencies, and rollback strategy for this change
Create an implementation blueprint that I can review before any code is written
I have requirements — write the full plan before any execution happens
Build a pre-implementation design document with all dependencies mapped
Execute this plan I have written in Plan.md
Fix the bug in my authentication middleware
Write the code for user registration with email verification
Brainstorm approaches to this problem before I implement
Review my pull request and suggest improvements
Set up a CI/CD pipeline for my project
Debug why my tests are failing
Refactor this component to use React hooks
Create a product roadmap for Q3 planning
Help me design the API contract for our new service
